goal: Show DeepSeek model route-task distribution changes in eval compare output so routing-policy patches can be audited without raw metrics JSON.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Eval state metrics collect model route-task counts, but baseline/candidate comparisons hide whether a harness patch shifted DeepSeek work between root-cause, memory, summary, planning, or FIM routes.
